name: four-dx-coach
description: Multi-scope coach for The 4 Disciplines of Execution — personal solo (agent = peer-witness), team-leader (agent = consultant), team-member (agent = personal coach to inherited-WIG situation). 12 skills total split across two modes: **coach-mode** (11 dialogue-driven Socratic skills that walk you step-by-step from zero) + **consultant-mode** (1 artifact-synthesis skill `4dx-audit` that reads existing strategy docs / OKRs / scoreboards / cadence notes, diagnoses per-layer status across the 5-layer 4DX model, and outputs a prioritized recommendations roadmap routing back into the coach skills). Coach-mode breakdown: 1 plugin router + 5 multi-file scope-flex skills (each bundles 2-4 protocols covering personal / team-leader / team-member variants of one 4DX topic — meta-strategy-triage, d1-wig-formulation, d2-lead-measures, d3-scoreboard, d4-cadence) + 5 single-file scope-specific skills (d1-personal-whirlwind-triage, d1-team-wig-cascade, meta-team-leader-onboarding, meta-team-xps-evaluation, sustain-personal-momentum-rescue). Multi-file skills self-detect scope via internal Socratic disambiguation; single-file skills are scope-locked because the source book has no cross-scope variant. Consultant-mode `4dx-audit` activates when user provides rich pre-existing artifacts and wants synthesis + roadmap rather than dialogue. All skills industry-grounded — Boundary sections cite primary academic + regulatory + credentialed-author sources beyond the source book (Goodhart 1975 / Kotter 1996 / Tufte 1983 / Reinertsen 2009 / Doerr 2018 / Akao 1991 / Edmondson 2018 / Pfeffer 2010 / Drucker HBR 1999 / Senge 1990 / Lencioni 2002 / Pfeffer-Sutton 2006 / CFPB / VA OIG / etc.) — addresses book's selection-bias and member-POV gaps. Personal scope walks one user through full 4DX adoption. Team-leader scope covers Primary WIG selection, Targets-not-Plans cascade, leader-onboarding, lead-measure facilitation, scoreboard design, facilitator-mode WIG Session, and XPS audit. Team-member scope helps you comprehend an inherited team WIG, identify sphere of influence on inherited leads, read team scoreboard, prep weekly commitment, and self-account honestly. Distilled from McChesney/Covey/Huling/Thele/Walker, *The 4 Disciplines of Execution* (2nd ed., 2021) via tsundoku:book-distill RIA-TV++ pipeline, then merged 2026-04-30 from 26 skills into 11 (Plan U) to consolidate scope-overlap surface area. Multilingual triggers (EN / 日本語 / 繁體中文); skill bodies in English. NOT for enterprise multi-team rollout (read book Part 2 directly), habit formation (atomic habits), or portfolio betting (OKR / lean experiments).
